title: shalah #7951
definition:
1) to be at rest, prosper, be quiet, be at ease
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be or have quiet
        1a2) to be at ease, prosper
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be at rest, prosper, be quiet, be at ease
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be or have quiet
        1a2) to be at ease, prosper

    NASB:  to be quiet or at ease
